resultResponses.name: Normal labs
resultResponses.text: [PATIENT_NAME]'s labs were reviewed and are within expected range for age. No changes to current care plan are needed.

resultResponses.name: Positive strep culture
resultResponses.text: Throat culture is positive for strep. Please continue prescribed antibiotic to completion and monitor hydration and fever trend.

messageReplies.name: Fever triage
messageReplies.text: For [PATIENT_NAME], continue fluids and antipyretics as needed. Please seek urgent care for breathing difficulty, poor hydration, lethargy, or persistent fever beyond 5 days.

messageReplies.name: Vaccine record request
messageReplies.text: Vaccine record for [PATIENT_NAME] has been prepared and can be provided through the portal.

refillTemplates.instructions: Take 1 tablet daily in the morning.

schoolForms.name: Fever-free return
schoolForms.text: May return to school/daycare once fever-free for 24 hours without fever-reducing medication and otherwise improving clinically.

priorAuth.text: Medication is medically necessary for controller therapy due to persistent symptoms and to reduce exacerbation risk.
